name: SentinelCorp
tagline: India company risk profile API for AI agents
description: Free API for validating Indian company identifiers (GSTIN, CIN, PAN), checking SEBI debarred entities, and computing unified risk scores. Built for agent workflows with MCP, LangChain, CrewAI, OpenAI integrations.

tools.name: company_risk_profile
tools.description: Get unified risk profile for an Indian company from CIN/GSTIN/PAN/name.

tools.name: batch_profile
tools.description: Risk profile up to 100 Indian companies in one request.

tools.name: validate_gstin
tools.description: Validate GSTIN format + checksum, extract state + PAN + entity.

tools.name: validate_cin
tools.description: Validate CIN format and extract listing status, state, year, industry, ownership.

tools.name: validate_pan
tools.description: Validate PAN format and identify PAN type.

tools.name: search_debarred
tools.description: Search SEBI/NSE/BSE debarred entities by name (14,000+ entities).

sibling_products.name: SentinelX402
sibling_products.description: Threat intelligence API for AI agents with CERT-In India advisories
